description_long: This object is a compact, semi-automatic handgun with a robust, angular frame and a matte dark finish. The slide is long and features serrations at the rear for grip, while the barrel is thick and prominent. The grip is textured and ergonomically shaped, with a visible magazine base at the bottom. The trigger guard is squared and slightly oversized, and the hammer is exposed at the rear. The iron sights are fixed and prominent on the top of the slide, and the ejection port is visible on the right side. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with a focus on durability and ease of use.
description: A modern, matte-finished semi-automatic handgun with a long slide, textured grip, and exposed hammer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel opening, front sight, and the squared trigger guard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full slide, grip texture, trigger, and exposed hammer.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rear sight, hammer, and the back of the grip.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, slide serrations, and grip details.
attribute_tail_design: No tail configuration present; not applicable.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear present; not applicable.
